data.content: Observed churn example: shipment_review expected changes on main, but the prior shipment session left 4 modified files and 2 untracked test files in the working tree with nothing committed or pushed. The review agent rolled the knot back to ready_for_shipment. This is the exact failure mode the no-PR / remote-main profile must prevent: prompts and step outputs must make it explicit whether the reviewer is supposed to inspect a branch, a PR, code already on main, or code already live, and shipment must not advance unless the expected artifact actually exists.
